name: Twinkie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the instant chocolate pudding according to package directions.
2. Break up the Twinkies into bite-sized pieces and place them in an oblong dish.
3. Spread the prepared pudding over the Twinkie pieces.
4. Sprinkle 3 crushed Heath candy bars evenly over the top.
5. Cover with Cool Whip and sprinkle the remaining 3 crushed Heath candy bars on top.
6. Chill until ready to serve. Enjoy!
